nodes.label: M114: AI Coding App Parity Gate
Phase: validating-milestone
M001: Extension Scaffold + GSD State Machine + Approval Gates
S01: Extension Scaffold + DB Layer
T01: Created extension scaffold with two-file loader pattern (loader.ts → cli.ts → index.ts), extension manifest, pkg/ shim directory, and wired package.json for pi-mono discovery
T02: Created GSD database layer with 5 tables, typed CRUD helpers for all entities, camelCase↔snake_case mapping, constraint enforcement, and 40 Vitest tests
S02: GSD State Machine + Approval Gates
T01: Implemented the GSD state machine engine with full lifecycle transition enforcement, phase detection, and 49 passing unit tests
T02: Built the approval gate system with configurable per-slice policies (always/high-risk-only/never) and 32 passing tests
T03: Created barrel export, engine factory, wired extension entry point, and wrote 5 integration tests proving full plan→execute→verify→complete lifecycle with approval gates
S03: GSD Tools + Commands + Pattern Control

T01: Implemented 10 GSD CRUD/state-machine tools (milestone_plan, slice_plan, task_plan, advance, approve, status, phase, list_milestones, list_slices, list_tasks) with TypeBox schemas, pi extension registration, and 36 passing tests.
T02: Implemented 5 slash commands (/gsd status, /gsd auto, /gsd plan, /bmad, /bmad list) and ContextScout pattern indexer with 25 passing tests.
S04: Dashboard UI + Integration Tests
T01: Created GSD dashboard module rendering milestone/slice/task progress as formatted widget, wired auto-refresh into extension events

T02: Wrote 22 integration tests covering full BMAD→GSD pipeline: tool CRUD, state machine lifecycle, gate blocking/approval, command handlers, dashboard rendering, ContextScout, BMAD agents, and error handling
M002: Auto-Mode Execution Loop
S01: Dispatch Engine + Auto-mode State
T01: Build dispatch engine with state analysis
T02: Build auto-mode state manager
T03: Test dispatch engine and auto-mode state comprehensively
S02: File Rendering System
T01: Build planning file renderers (ROADMAP, SLICE-PLAN, TASK-PLAN)
T02: Build summary file renderers (TASK-SUMMARY, SLICE-SUMMARY, MILESTONE-SUMMARY, UAT, VALIDATION)
T03: Test all renderers comprehensively
S03: Enhanced Completion Tools + Auto-mode Wiring
T01: Build completion tools (task_complete, slice_complete, milestone_validate, milestone_complete)
T02: Wire /gsd auto command to dispatch engine, add gsd_dispatch tool
T03: Full integration test for auto-mode lifecycle
M100: Integration Test Milestone
M101: Model Config + BMAD Discovery + PRD Import
S01: Model Configuration System
T01: Build model config types, YAML loader, tier presets, and validation
T02: Wire /umb model command and add integration tests
S02: BMAD Discovery Commands
T01: Define discovery command types and agent mapping layer
T02: Implement discovery command handlers with session delegation
T03: Write integration tests for discovery commands
S03: PRD Import Bridge
T01: Build PRD markdown parser and tests
T02: Wire /gsd import command with DB persistence and REQUIREMENTS.md render
